Description: Develop the resilience to work through obstacles without giving up. In design and production, challenges are opportunities to deepen understanding and strengthen technique.
Cultivate a genuine drive to learn and investigate beyond the minimum. Great designers ask 'why' and 'what if' at every stage of the creative process.
Hold every project — regardless of complexity — to the highest standard you are capable of. Excellence is a habit built through intentional, consistent practice.
Actively seek new skills, techniques, and perspectives that expand what you can bring to your work. Professional growth does not stop at the classroom door.
Recognize when and how past skills apply to new challenges. The ability to transfer learning across contexts is the mark of a truly adaptable professional.
